steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app
Enter valid login credentials
Save login credentials for auto-login
Close and re-launch the app
tests.expected_result: The app automatically logs in with the saved credentials without requiring manual login

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the dashboard
Trigger an automated feedback message by completing a mental health assessment
Verify the feedback message is displayed on the dashboard
tests.expected_result: The automated feedback message is displayed on the dashboard with relevant and supportive content

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Enable the automated mood tracking feature
Simulate a series of user inputs to test the automated tracking functionality
tests.expected_result: The app accurately tracks and displays the user's mood changes over time, reflecting the inputs provided during the simulation

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Select a random mood from the provided options and submit it
Verify that the submitted mood is recorded and displayed in the app's dashboard
tests.expected_result: The app successfully records and displays the user's submitted mood, and it is reflected in the dashboard with a timestamp.

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Select a random mood from the provided options and submit it
Verify that the submitted mood is displayed on the dashboard
tests.expected_result: The submitted mood is accurately recorded and displayed on the dashboard, with a corresponding timestamp

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Select a random mood from the provided options and submit it
Verify that the submitted mood is recorded and displayed in the app's dashboard
tests.expected_result: The app successfully records and displays the user's submitted mood, and the dashboard reflects the updated mood information

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the home screen
Verify that the app prompts the user to set up daily wellbeing check-ins
Set up daily reminders for wellbeing check-ins and save the settings
Verify that the app sends auto-reminders for daily wellbeing check-ins at the set time
tests.expected_result: The app successfully sends auto-reminders for daily wellbeing check-ins at the set time and allows the user to access the check-in feature

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Enter a random mood rating and submit it
Verify that the submitted mood rating is displayed on the mood tracking graph
tests.expected_result: The submitted mood rating is accurately reflected on the mood tracking graph, with the correct rating and timestamp

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Fill in the mood tracking survey and start the timer
Simulate an interruption by closing the app before the timer expires
Relaunch the app and navigate back to the mood tracking section
tests.expected_result: The app displays the previously saved mood tracking survey progress, confirming that the auto-save feature successfully retained user data.

steps: Launch the mental wellbeing app and navigate to the mood tracking section
Select a random mood from the provided options and submit it
Verify that the submitted mood is displayed on the dashboard
tests.expected_result: The submitted mood is accurately displayed on the dashboard, and the dashboard reflects the correct date and time of submission
